extracted_claim.claim_summary: The customer claims an item inside the package is broken.

image_assessments.notes: The image shows the exterior of a package with visible crushing and damage to the box.
The image shows the opened package with various items inside, none of which appear to be broken.

result.user_claim: Customer: The item inside is broken. | Support: Is the outer box damaged as well? | Customer: The box looked bad, but my main claim is the item inside. | Support: Should the reviewer check item condition? | Customer: Yes, inside item broken.
result.evidence_standard_met_reason: At least one image shows the claimed contents with sufficient clarity to evaluate the claim.
result.claim_status_justification: The claimed issue (broken_part) is not visible. Images show 'crushed_packaging' instead. Claim is contradicted by visual evidence.
